headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Biogen (BIIB) After Its 50% One Year Share Price Jump
summary: If you are wondering whether Biogen's current share price offers value or risk, it helps to first look at how the stock has been behaving and what recent news might mean for its long term prospects. Biogen's last close was US$172.97, with returns of a 2.5% decline over 7 days, a 9.2% decline over 30 days, a 2.7% decline year to date, but a 50.2% gain over 1 year, alongside 40.0% and 36.0% declines over 3 and 5 years respectively. These mixed returns sit against a backdrop of ongoing...

headline: Biogen price target raised to $200 from $190 at Morgan Stanley
summary: Morgan Stanley raised the firm’s price target on Biogen (BIIB) to $200 from $190 and keeps an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm adjusted models among its biopharma coverage for IQVIA trends as well as intra-quarter updates ahead of Q1 earnings reporting from the group.Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanksUnlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor P
